hints.text: Press W, A, S, D to move, R to respawn, SPACE to pause.

Press "P" and hover over a power gnerating/consuming block to view info about the network it is on.
Press "N" while viewing a network to set that as the viewed network. It will keep viewing that network until you press "N" again on a non-power block or a different network.
Some resources like [res://textures/resources/sand.png]Sand are destroyed upon trying to be inputted into the core.

You need to be in command mode to command units.
Press "U" to go into command mode then left-click and drag to select units; then right-click to have the units go where you right-clicked.

markers.text: [res://textures/resources/copper.png](-orange)Copper (-white) is a important resorce on Tarkon. you'll need to mine it.

(-white)You'll need to mine [res://textures/resources/copper.png](-orange)Copper(-white) manually first. Click on [res://textures/terrain/CopperOre.png](-orange)Copper Ore(-white) to mine it with your core drone.
(-white)Researh the [res://textures/blocks/power/VentTurbine.png](-black)Vent Turbine(-white) and place it on a vent.
(-white)Now resarch and place a [res://textures/blocks/power/CableNode.png](-orange)Cable Node(-white) to transmit power.

(-white)Research and place a [res://textures/blocks/resource extractors/MechanicalDrill/MechanicalDrillComplete.png](-brown)Mechanical Drill(-white) facing copper ore to automate the mining of copper.
(-white)Now research and place 6 [res://textures/blocks/item transportation/Belt/Belt.png](-brown)Conveyor Belts(-white) to move items from the drill to your core.
[res://textures/resources/graphite.png](-black)Graphite(-white) is also an important resource. Set up power, drills and conveyors to mine it.
(-white)Research and place a [res://textures/blocks/resource extractors/WallCrusher/WallCrusherComplete.png]Wall Crusher to grind sand from the walls.

(-white)Research and place a [res://textures/blocks/factories/Silicon Refinery/SiliconRefineryComplete.png]Silicon Refinery.
(-white)You'll need to provide it with graphite, sand and power.

(-white)Set up power, drills, and conveyors; then research and place 3 [res://textures/blocks/turrets/SingleBarrel/SingleBarrelBase.png](-gray)Single Barrel (-white)turrets to defend your base from enemies. 
(-white)You'll also need to research the [res://textures/blocks/item transportation/BeltRouter.jpeg]Belt Router to split resources on belts in multiple directions.
(-white)Now research and place 6 [res://textures/blocks/walls/LargeCopperWall.png]Large Copper Walls to protect your base from enemies.

(-white)Next, you'll need to produce your own units to attack the enemy base.
(-white)Set up drills and conveyors and research the [res://textures/blocks/units/TankFabricator.png]Tank Fabricator. You'll need to supply resources to it to produce units.
(-white)Now command your units and destroy the enemy base. You may need to wait for more units to be produced
(-white)Now place your own core. Cores can only be placed on core zone tiles.
